API Reference

Documents API

Document storage, retrieval, metadata, bulk operations, and error handling

#Document API

The Document API provides operations for storing, retrieving, and managing XML and JSON documents.

#Storing Documents

#XML Documents

#JSON Documents

#With Metadata

#Storage Options

#Retrieving Documents

#As String

#As XDocument

#As Stream

#Check Existence

#Document Metadata

#Get Metadata

#Set Metadata

#Query by Metadata

#Listing Documents

#All Documents

#With Prefix

#With Pagination

#Deleting Documents

#Single Document

#Multiple Documents

#In Transaction

#Document Information

#Bulk Operations

#Import Multiple Documents

#Export Documents

#Error Handling

#Document Names

#Naming Conventions

#Name Validation

#Best Practices

  1. Use meaningful names - Names should identify content

  2. Organize with virtual paths - Use / for logical grouping

  3. Add metadata - Store non-content information as metadata

  4. Use transactions - For related document operations

  5. Stream large documents - Use stream APIs for documents > 1MB

  6. Validate on store - Enable validation for data integrity

#Next Steps

Management

Querying
